description: Benchmark test cases for Context Engine retrieval quality
notes: Uses this project's codebase as corpus. Expected files are relative paths from project root. Natural language queries accept both documentation and code files as valid results. v3.0: expanded from 16 to 35 queries covering governance server, documentation, cross-file concepts, EXECUTION-FRAMEWORK, and scripts.

test_cases.query: file watcher circuit breaker consecutive failures
test_cases.description: Circuit breaker logic for watcher failures (code + tests)

test_cases.query: BM25 keyword search tokenization
test_cases.description: BM25 index building and keyword search

test_cases.query: atomic file write JSON corruption prevention
test_cases.description: Atomic write pattern for crash safety

test_cases.query: PDF content extraction page limit
test_cases.description: PDF connector with page limits

test_cases.query: rate limiting token bucket index_project
test_cases.description: Rate limiting for index_project tool

test_cases.query: LRU project eviction MAX_LOADED_PROJECTS
test_cases.description: LRU eviction of loaded projects

test_cases.query: embedding model allowlist security validation
test_cases.description: Embedding model safety allowlist

test_cases.query: gitignore contextignore pattern matching
test_cases.description: Ignore pattern loading and matching

test_cases.query: how does the watcher interact with the indexer for incremental updates
test_cases.description: Cross-file relationship: watcher triggers indexer

test_cases.query: error handling patterns in MCP server tools
test_cases.description: Natural language query about error handling

test_cases.query: tree-sitter AST parsing function definitions
test_cases.description: Tree-sitter code parsing implementation

test_cases.query: markdown heading extraction document chunking
test_cases.description: Document connector heading-based chunking

test_cases.query: hybrid search combining semantic and keyword scores
test_cases.description: Score fusion — code implementation or architecture documentation

test_cases.query: incremental indexing file hash change detection
test_cases.description: File change detection — indexer, models (FileMetadata), or watcher

test_cases.query: spreadsheet CSV Excel parsing
test_cases.description: Spreadsheet connector

test_cases.query: project status index size watcher health
test_cases.description: Project status reporting across code and docs

test_cases.query: cross-encoder reranking results after score fusion
test_cases.description: Cross-encoder reranking implementation in CE and governance retrieval

test_cases.query: IPC socket embedding daemon communication protocol
test_cases.description: IPC embedding service: client, daemon, socket protocol

test_cases.query: governance principle domain routing semantic similarity
test_cases.description: Domain routing stage in governance retrieval pipeline

test_cases.query: project root detection markers path resolution
test_cases.description: Path resolution: PROJECT_MARKERS, looks_like_project, root detection

test_cases.query: constitutional amendment ratification process
test_cases.description: Governance constitution amendment procedures (pure document retrieval)

test_cases.query: EXECUTION-FRAMEWORK bucket model eight automation tiers
test_cases.description: 8-bucket model with automation tiers (B1-B8)

test_cases.query: S-series safety principles absolute veto escalation
test_cases.description: S-series safety principles that trigger mandatory escalation

test_cases.query: MCP tool input validation schema error response
test_cases.description: Tool input validation and error handling in both MCP servers

test_cases.query: YAML frontmatter metadata parsing document connector
test_cases.description: Frontmatter extraction for metadata-enhanced retrieval

test_cases.query: enforcement advisory versus structural compliance checking
test_cases.description: Enforcement module: advisory vs structural compliance modes

test_cases.query: progressive application maturity gate principle activation
test_cases.description: Progressive application (§7.8) for principle maturity gating

test_cases.query: config generator CLAUDE.md agent installation output
test_cases.description: Config generator for CLAUDE.md and agent config output

test_cases.query: embedding model benchmark MRR recall evaluation script
test_cases.description: Benchmark script for embedding model quality evaluation

test_cases.query: install agent scaffold project MCP tool registration
test_cases.description: Agent installation and project scaffolding MCP tools

test_cases.query: reference library entry categorization tags domain
test_cases.description: Reference library entries with frontmatter tags and domain categorization

test_cases.query: MMR maximal marginal relevance diversity enforcement
test_cases.description: MMR diversity algorithm in CE retrieval pipeline

test_cases.query: watcher daemon process lifecycle health monitoring
test_cases.description: Daemon process management: start, stop, health checks

test_cases.query: how does evaluate_governance assess a planned action
test_cases.description: Semantic query about governance evaluation flow (cross-file concept)

test_cases.description: Multi-agent domain: principles and cross-file references
